title: CodeGrind evolves with AI-assisted practice and cyberpunk battle flavor
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted DSA practice and the refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk game within the platform, highlighting new AI capabilities and immersive visuals.
core_message: CodeGrind combines Azure OpenAI-powered assistance with an upgraded Code Breach tower-defense integration to deliver guided, interactive learning. Real-time editor, problem filtering, and immersive visuals bring coding concepts to life.
cta: Try the new AI-assisted practice flow and explore the revamped Code Breach visuals today.
visual_brief: Static showcase image featuring the CodeGrind editor panel alongside a cyberpunk Code Breach game scene, with AI assistant overlay hints and glowing towers representing code concepts.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
